Quito · Ecuador

I design software for complex, regulated environments — federal, financial, and compliance systems. I pair deep UX judgment and research with production-grade design-engineering, turning dense data and compliance models into interfaces people trust.

15+ yrs design Booz Allen Hamilton · DoD · VA · FAA · Merck · Mondelēz · Pichincha · Juan Valdez

Experience

2022–NOW

Booz Allen Hamilton

Army · DoD · VA · FAA

Senior Product Designer (Design-Engineering)

  • Lead UX/UI for the federal Trusted Environments platform and Developer Portal; architected two parallel design systems (/te-skin, agent-consumable, and TE Black) with WCAG 2.1 AA audited into the tokens.
  • Built LLM-based persona emulators to pressure-test flows before development — design research at agent speed — and consult Army/DoD teams on secure UI pipelines.
2026–NOW

Compliance SaaS · LATAM

Paying Pilots

Founder · Lead Product Designer

  • Founded a multi-site compliance SaaS for LATAM SMBs; owned product design end-to-end and shipped a validated 1.0 MVP to production in 40 days (346 commits, 21 SQL migrations).
  • Designed a 31-component UI system in Figma and shipped it in React 19 / TypeScript at 100% fidelity, hardened through a 17-part design-system migration (78.4 → 95.6).
2016–2022

Xentinels DesignOps

Design Systems Lead · Product Manager

  • Built and led a DesignOps practice inside Central Design, scaling a distributed-yet-centralized, multi-theme design system and token library for enterprise clients (Merck, Mondelēz, Banco Pichincha, Quifatex, Azzorti).
  • Ran the qualitative research program (interviews, usability testing, card sorting) and owned the design-to-engineering handoff — a single source of UI truth across teams.
